icp.label: Execution-stalled operator
icp.description: Founders, CEOs, or CROs at $2M-$50M revenue companies in Tech, Telecom, IT Services, or B2B SaaS who have a viable offer but are stuck in the gap between knowing what to do and actually doing it.
trigger_set: Hiring sales team — posting for SDR, AE, VP Sales, CRO roles
New product launch — expanding beyond core offering
Growth plateau — revenue flatlined after initial growth
Entering new market — geographic or vertical expansion
Funding event — just raised Series A/B/C, under pressure to execute

triggers.label: Moments of visible tension

hiring_sales_team: B2B SaaS company hiring 'VP Sales' OR 'Head of Sales' OR 'CRO' 2026
tech company hiring 'SDR' OR 'Account Executive' OR 'sales team' 2026
IT services company 'building sales team' OR 'first sales hire' 2026
new_product_offer: tech company 'launching new product' OR 'new offering' 2026
B2B SaaS 'new product launch' OR 'product expansion' 2026
IT services 'new service line' OR 'new vertical' 2026
growth_plateau: CEO OR founder 'growth plateau' OR 'stalled revenue' tech 2026
B2B SaaS 'struggling to grow' OR 'revenue plateau' 2026
tech company CEO 'execution challenges' OR 'scaling pain' 2026
entering_new_market: tech company 'entering new market' OR 'geographic expansion' 2026
B2B company 'expanding into' market CEO announcement 2026
funding_event: series A OR series B tech company raised funding 2026
site:crunchbase.com funding round SaaS IT services 2026

triggers.triangulation_method: Cross-reference: person shows tension signal + company $2M-$50M + person holds Founder/CEO/CRO role. All 3 = HIGH (90). Two of 3 = MEDIUM (80). One = LOW (60).

outreach_angles.name: Pattern recognition
outreach_angles.template: Saw your post about [signal]. I work with operators who hit exactly this wall — offer is solid but execution stalls. Not pitching, but I've solved this for similar founders. Worth 15 min?

outreach_angles.name: Rhythm angle
outreach_angles.template: Your [product] clearly has demand — gap is between knowing what to do and having the daily rhythm to execute. I help operators build that system. Quick call useful?

outreach_angles.name: Specificity angle
outreach_angles.template: I noticed [specific signal: hiring post, launch, pivot]. That signals [what it means]. I help operators at this exact moment build the daily system that turns offers into revenue.

outreach_angles.name: Peer angle
outreach_angles.template: Been where you are — good offer, real skills, but the daily machine wasn't running. Built a system that fixed it. Now I run 90-min breakdowns for operators in your spot. Interested?

message_rules: Personalize to specific person and their visible tension
No pitch in first message — start diagnostic conversation
Reference something specific they said publicly

confidence_score_mapping.90: HIGH - All 3: role (CEO/CRO) + company size ($2M-$50M) + public tension signal
confidence_score_mapping.80: MEDIUM-HIGH - 2 of 3: role + company size, OR role + tension (smaller company)
confidence_score_mapping.70: MEDIUM - 2 of 3 signals OR 1 strong signal + industry fit
confidence_score_mapping.60: LOW - 1 signal OR insufficient data (requires research)

disqualification_rules: No public GTM tension signal = RESEARCH before qualifying
Recent restructuring/exec change <6 months = FLAG for review

daily_rhythm: 6:57 AM - Trigger Scan: Find 5-8 qualified targets with execution tension signals
8:03 AM - Outreach: Draft personalized messages using angles + observed signals
Manual Send: Review and send on LinkedIn/email (user handles)
12:03 PM - Follow-up: Auto-draft for non-responders (3+ days)
response_tracking: When person responds: Update target-list.json status → 'responded' OR 'booked'
Rejected: Mark as 'rejected' with reason, do NOT re-prospect
No response after 5 days: Auto-draft follow-up
Bounced: Mark as 'invalid_contact', move to next lead
